mapper.sql: id, term, meaning, field_name, major_name, minor_name, status, wrong_count, quiz_enabled, choice1, choice2, choice3, choice4, answer_index, last_reviewed_on, last_reviewed_at, last_correct_at, priority, updated_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM words
(term LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR meaning LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND minor_name = #{minorName}
AND status = #{status}
AND wrong_count >= 5
AND wrong_count BETWEEN 2 AND 4
AND wrong_count <= 1
ORDER BY wrong_count DESC, term ASC
SELECT DISTINCT minor_name FROM words WHERE minor_name IS NOT NULL AND minor_name <> '' ORDER BY minor_name ASC
SELECT FROM words WHERE quiz_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY wrong_count DESC, updated_at DESC, term ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE words SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, status = '要復習', last_reviewed_on = CURRENT_DATE, last_reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE words SET last_reviewed_on = CURRENT_DATE, last_reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_correct_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE words SET last_reviewed_on = CURRENT_DATE, last_reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE words SET quiz_enabled = #{quizEnabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE words SET quiz_enabled = #{quizEnabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT minor_name, SUM(COALESCE(wrong_count, 0)) AS wrong_count_total, SUM(CASE WHEN last_reviewed_at IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN DATEDIFF('DAY', CAST(last_reviewed_at AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS due_review_count FROM words WHERE quiz_enabled = TRUE GROUP BY minor_name

SELECT id AS word_id, term, minor_name, CASE WHEN last_reviewed_at IS NULL THEN 999 ELSE DATEDIFF('DAY', CAST(last_reviewed_at AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE) END AS days_from_last_review FROM words WHERE quiz_enabled = TRUE AND ( last_reviewed_at IS NULL OR DATEDIFF('DAY', CAST(last_reviewed_at AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE) IN (1, 3, 7) OR DATEDIFF('DAY', CAST(last_reviewed_at AS DATE), CURRENT_DATE) > 7 ) ORDER BY days_from_last_review DESC, wrong_count DESC, term ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE words SET term = #{term}, meaning = #{meaning}, minor_name = #{minorName}, status = #{status}, wrong_count = COALESCE(#{wrongCount}, 0), quiz_enabled = COALESCE(#{quizEnabled}, TRUE), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO words ( term, meaning, field_name, major_name, minor_name, status, wrong_count, quiz_enabled, choice1, choice2, choice3, choice4, answer_index, last_reviewed_on, last_reviewed_at, last_correct_at, priority, updated_at ) KEY (term) VALUES ( #{term}, #{meaning}, COALESCE(#{fieldName}, '未分類'), COALESCE(#{majorName}, '未分類'), #{minorName}, COALESCE(#{status}, '学習中'), COALESCE(#{wrongCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{quizEnabled}, TRUE), #{choice1}, #{choice2}, #{choice3}, #{choice4}, #{answerIndex}, #{lastReviewedOn}, #{lastReviewedAt}, #{lastCorrectAt}, COALESCE(#{priority}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
